description_long: This futuristic airplane features a sleek, angular fuselage with a predominantly white and gray color scheme accented by blue and yellow hazard stripes. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated into the body, with visible blue piping or cabling running along the upper surfaces. The cockpit is positioned at the front, enclosed with a dark, tinted canopy, and flanked by angular intakes or sensor panels. The sides of the fuselage display mechanical details, including vents, panels, and what appear to be access hatches, giving it a high-tech, industrial appearance. The tail section is sharply pointed and streamlined, with no visible vertical stabilizer, suggesting a unique or advanced aerodynamic design. The overall form is compact and robust, suitable for rapid maneuvering in urban environments.
description: A sleek, futuristic airplane with swept-back wings, a forward-enclosed cockpit, and industrial blue and yellow accents. Its compact, angular design features visible piping and mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and wide, angular wings with yellow hazard stripes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the swept-back wing, blue piping, and detailed fuselage panels with hazard striping along the lower edge.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the sharply tapered tail, integrated wings, and the overall symmetry of the design.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing blue piping, mechanical panels, and the streamlined body profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with integrated design and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; possible integrated jet or electric propulsion within the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: No visible vertical stabilizer; features a streamlined, pointed tail with a blended configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No landing gear visible in the images; possible retractable configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy and dark-tinted windows.
